prerequisites.value: Engulf Revulsion; engulf or smother universal monster ability.

description.value: **Benefit:** When you successfully engulf or smother an opponent, successfully maintain a grapple combat maneuver on a smothered opponent, the opponent must succeed at a Will save (DC = 10 + 1/2 your Hit Dice + your Strength modifier) or become staggered for 1 round. This is a mind-affecting fear effect.
